Programs

Civil Aviation Cabin Services

MENU

The Civil Aviation Cabin Services Program aims to provide students with an education that contributes to both professional and personal development and aims to provide a solid foundation for a career in the aviation industry.

Within the scope of the program, students acquire basic knowledge on topics such as International Civil Aviation Organizations and Rules, Cabin Crew Duties and Responsibilities, Passenger Relations, Emergency Procedures, First Aid, Operational Procedures, Dangerous Goods Transportation, Basic Communication Skills and Foreign Language. This training provides students with the opportunity to develop not only technical knowledge but also effective communication, leadership and emergency response skills.

Our students acquire basic knowledge about the civil aviation sector through practical applications. After graduation, they can be employed as Cabin Officers in airline companies and in operational units in airports and other businesses related to the aviation sector.In all our aviation programs, students are educated with Vocational English courses and a flexible curriculum carried out by our academic staff working in the leading companies of the sector. Students are provided with opportunities to do internships and make important connections in the sector and are supported in finding a job after graduation.
